title: ラーメンとの熱い勝負！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Bamboo Memory asked to eat at a ramen shop
known for being spicy.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Agh! It's sh-sho... shpicy! My mouf is on fire!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: It'sh sho hod! Id feelsh lige dere'sh a shurigen in my droat!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Bud shdill... dish proobs we foughd brabely! I wan
more!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She says she wants more, but first we douse the
flames in our mouths with cold water.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
What should I do? It's so spicy! But... I can't just leave
it... Ughhh.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Hey! If you don't want it, I'd be happy to eat it for
you.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Really?!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
I was just thinking about ordering more anyway!
Besides... if someone needs help, I've gotta step
up!

text_block_list.name: Customers
text_block_list.text:
U-um! Take mine too if you can!
I haven't even touched mine yet, so please take
it!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Sure! For the sake of this store... and as the
blazing head of the disciplinary committee, I'm
here to help!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The cries for help set Bamboo Memory's heart
ablaze... It looks like she's got quite a lot of
ramen to eat!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The cries for help set Bamboo Memory's heart
ablaze... It looks like she's got quite a lot of
ramen to eat!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
T-Trainer... But you looked like you were
struggling so much!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
I respect your enthusiasm! If you need help
though, don't hesitate to tap me in!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
You go, Trainer! When you're ready for more, I've
already got some ready!

text_block_list.name: Customers
text_block_list.text:
Talk about guts! Just look at those chopsticks fly!
I think I'll try again!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Whoa! You're inspiring everyone, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Afterwards, people who had already given up
decide to finish their ramen, and Bamboo
Memory doesn't have to eat any extra.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
All right! Looks like I'm going extra red-hot
rounds with this insanely spicy ramen! Here goes!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Phew! Sweet... VICTORY!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She slurps down the rest of ramen heroically, and
the entire shop roars with applause!
